verificationQueueDesc: Declarations where you requested additional documents from the hospital or parents. They appear here until documents are provided and you resume review.
requestDocumentsDesc: Specify which documents are needed. Parents will be notified by SMS/email and the hospital will see your request.
welcomeSubtitle: Review and register birth declarations for your center
incomingDeclarationsDesc: All declarations received by your center, with search and status filters.
noCenterAssignedDesc: Your account is not linked to a civil status center. Contact a super administrator to assign your center.
emptyQueue: No pending declarations. New submissions from hospitals will appear here in real time.
incomingDesc: Submitted and in-progress declarations from hospitals
emptyQueueHint: Declarations appear here after the hospital submits them to your center. Drafts at the hospital are not visible yet.
emptyDocumentsQueue: No declarations awaiting documents. Use "Request Documents" during review when more proof is needed.
parentNotificationsDesc: SMS and email messages queued when the declaration status changes. Processed by the notification service.
noNotifications: No notifications sent yet for this declaration.
registrationAutoDesc: A sequential registration number is generated automatically (REG-CENTER-YEAR-000001). Leave the field empty unless you need to override it.
